insight: the property layer's single-testable-function criterion is met by 405/500 = 0.81 of SWE-bench Verified (scikit-learn 0.94, sympy 0.89 high; pylint 0.40, requests/seaborn 0.50 low) - a broad structural reach, but an upper bound because property-derivability within it is function-dependent (high for math, lower for application libraries)
next_action: within the high-applicability repos, measure the fraction of applicable instances that admit a derivable gold-free property, to turn the upper bound into a property-derivability rate
